title: Staff Software Engineer - Backend
score_reasoning: This role is significantly more aligned than the Belgrade and London postings. Your 7 years of distributed systems, microservices, and infrastructure work directly match the emphasis on large-scale critical systems, and Go is explicitly listed as a preferred backend language alongside Java and Scala. The role's focus on infrastructure, cloud-agnostic abstractions, and developer experience aligns with your systems-thinking demonstrated in your zero-downtime migration work at Velox. Your staff-level responsibilities and proven leadership fit well. However, Aarhus is in Scandinavia (~1h ahead of Berlin), within your acceptable timezone band, but the posting does not explicitly state remote work; this creates moderate ambiguity. Additionally, you lack Kubernetes experience, which is mentioned as a preference, and the role emphasizes mentorship and cross-team influence — important for staff level, though not a gap. The strong overlap on Go and distributed systems keeps this viable.

red_flags: Kubernetes experience preferred but not in your skillset
Aarhus location with unclear remote eligibility; ~1h timezone offset from Berlin
Staff+ role requires explicit mentorship and architectural leadership; your CV shows technical proof but limited explicit leadership narrative
